3146480.name: oath: there is a you that remains
3146480.description:
Can you remember?

It's been a long time... way too long. Are you losing slip of yourself? Everything around you is familiar, the same as it always was - but... It still doesn't feel right. 

Search for the part of you that remains as you make your way through the short new story of oath: there is a you that remains, the companion piece to vai5000's 2025 album.

Features:

  • Brand-New Story:

    Play through the new story of there is a you that remains, with a new setting and characters, disconnected from the main story of oath. Runtime is around the same as the entirety of base-game oath, totalling 7-8 hours across the two stories on a casual playthrough.

  • Completely revamped GUI and menus:

    The main menu, music player and other menus have all been given a fresh coat of paint to fit with the new album and DLC! All prior main menu unlocks are still available, as well as a few new ones too!

  • Gigantic new map with tons of side content and things to discover:

    Start out in the new world of there is a you that remains, with a fully interconnected map that is 4 times the size of the base game! Not only is it larger, but it is packed with even more details - with almost every single thing (down to every individual bush) being interactable, and many mysterious characters to talk to, things to discover, and side stories to complete!

Enhanced Visuals:

The world of there is a you that remains has been visually enhanced compared to the base game - with new lighting effects in almost all indoor areas, increased details in the world itself with far more objects and sprites, as well as a variety of other enhancements both to the gameworld and UI! Even some areas in oath's base content have been affected! 

In an update to the DLC, the RPG worlds for both base game oath and this DLC now have hundreds of fully animated sprites! Grass and coral will move in the wind/water, water itself having ripples and waves - almost everything you'd expect to have some movement now is animated!

Expanded music player:

WIth an updated look and fitting rename, the EP player from the base game is now the music player! Including not only oath, vai5000's 2024 EP in its entirety, but also the whole of there is a you that remains as well! Thats a total of 15 tracks playable straight from the main menu with the built-in player!

Plus a lot more!

Explore the brand new world of there is a you that remains, and maybe find yourself in the process. Plenty of new secrets and interactions await you, with a myriad of new achievements to unlock as well - aim for the 100% to experience everything oath: there is a you that remains has in store!

Even more underground musicians join the game, with music cameos throughout the world - if you've achieved a certain achievement in the base games story, you'll be able to listen to over 50 new tracks while you explore the world!
3146480.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
